_comment: Service taxonomy for classifying FTS contract awards by service type. 13 categories designed around how a bid director searches for opportunities — by what the service IS, not which procurement vehicle was used. Classification is done by LLM reading title + description + CPV context.

categories.name: Professional Services & Consulting
categories.description: Strategy, advisory, business change, organisational design, legal advisory, financial audit, actuarial, property advisory, specialist regulated professions. The thinking and advising, not the doing.

categories.name: Programme & Project Management
categories.description: Programme, project and portfolio management. PMO setup and operation, programme assurance, delivery management. Cross-cuts all sectors and service types but is a distinct sell and a distinct procurement category.

categories.name: Digital
categories.description: Design, build and deploy digital services — apps, platforms, user-centred services, GDS-standard delivery. The new-build digital world, not managed IT.

categories.name: Software & Systems Integration
categories.description: ERP/CRM/EDRMS implementation, SAP/Oracle/ServiceNow/Dynamics deployments, systems configuration, data migration, integration. Making commercial software work in an organisation.

categories.name: Technology Services
categories.description: Managed IT, infrastructure management, networks, service desks, SIAM, end-user computing, telecoms. Running the IT shop, not building new things.

categories.name: Cyber Security
categories.description: Security assessment, penetration testing, security advisory, SOC operations, incident response, security architecture, crypto. All of information security.

categories.name: Software & Cloud Products
categories.description: Buying software — SaaS subscriptions, COTS licences, cloud hosting, platform products. The product purchase, not the implementation or the support.

categories.name: AI & Data
categories.description: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, data platforms, analytics, automation, intelligent document processing, data engineering. A growing standalone category.

categories.name: BPO / Outsourced Services
categories.description: Business process outsourcing and operational service delivery. Pensions administration, HR services, contact centres, citizen services, facilities management, payroll, back-office operations. People-intensive operational delivery.

categories.name: IT Outsourcing
categories.description: Application management, ERP support, managed applications, IT operations outsourcing. Technology-led operational delivery, distinct from BPO (people-led) and Technology Services (shorter-term managed services).

categories.name: Workforce / Contingent Labour
categories.description: Staffing, interim management, agency workers, specialist contractors. Buying people by the day/hour, not outcomes or deliverables.

categories.name: Construction
categories.description: Major works, refurbishment, estate services, new build, infrastructure construction, professional construction services. A distinct market with distinct suppliers, large deals, and complex delivery.

categories.name: Training & Education
categories.description: Learning and development, professional training, simulation, apprenticeships, e-learning. Building capability in people.
